summary: Hydrated state moved the active canonical path from #41598 to the replacement PR #73982. #73982 carries forward credit for #50392 and #41598, but merge and closeout are blocked by the unresolved session-level exec policy trust-model question noted in the hydrated ClawSweeper review; #41598 is superseded but should not be closed until the canonical fix path is reviewed and lands. #50392 is already closed and receives no mutation.

actions.reason: Maintainer review is needed to decide whether /bash may inherit session-stored exec policy overrides, or whether #73982 must be narrowed before repair, rebase, review, and merge.
Superseded closeout is fix-first blocked by require_fix_before_close and by the canonical fix path #73982 needing maintainer review before it can become the landed fix.

needs_human: #73982 needs maintainer/security review on the trust model for applying session-stored exec policy overrides to /bash before Clownfish can repair/rebase/merge it or close #41598 as superseded.
